name: aria-desktop
description: Aria Desktop app assembly and host wrapper over the @aria/desktop shell seam

scripts.build: bun run build:renderer && bun run build:host
scripts.smoke:build: bun run build && bun -e "for (const path of ['./dist/electron-main.js', './dist/electron-preload.js', './dist/renderer/index.html']) { if (!(await Bun.file(path).exists())) throw new Error('Missing ' + path) }"
